response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with a genuine craftsmanship ethos, but he is a poor match for this specific role. The position requires 8 years of C++ programming; his professional C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments plus a thesis project, and C++ does not even appear in his skills list. His infrastructure experience (high-throughput DLang microservices at Sociomantic, some AWS CDK and Kubernetes) is real but falls well short of 5 years building large-scale cloud compute or distributed systems, and he has no formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers.
strengths: Experience with low-latency, high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing record through workshops, courses, and open-source project leadership
Broad polyglot engineering background with solid testing and software-craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement, with only about seven months of professional C++ work
Limited cloud architecture and compute-platform depth; most recent work is web/product engineering in TypeScript and Node.js
No formal technical-leadership experience leading cross-team strategy, priorities, and deliverables
